last_result: The generated research asset inventory now reconciles five current formal-runner problems, four legacy Go-runner problems, 78 experiment manifests and 19 algorithm asset records without treating 115 RAG cards as verified algorithms. Only the four hash-verified CVRP experts are selector-registered. TTP algorithm-selection evidence motivates future development-only contribution and feature-cost analysis, but the frozen router cohort and untouched confirmation remain unchanged.
